case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MARTEL, LUIS C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTEL, LUIS C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
